data.title: RegScale wins 2025 CODiE Award for Best Compliance Solution, reducing audit prep time by 60% and certification timelines by 90%.
data.description: RegScale, a company based in Tysons Corner, Virginia, has recently secured the prestigious 2025 CODiE Award for Best Compliance Solution. Specializing in Continuous Controls Monitoring (CCM), RegScale aims to revolutionize compliance processes by introducing artificial intelligence and automation to address the inefficiencies of traditional, labor-intensive GRC tools. Through its innovative platform, RegScale empowers organizations to achieve a significant 60% decrease in audit preparation and response duration, as well as a remarkable 90% acceleration in certification timelines, particularly for regulations such as FedRAMP.

data.title: The Conference Board launches Consumer Confidence Survey® Premium Dataset with 400+ demographic crosstabs and spending plans.
data.description: New York, October 23, 2025 - The Consumer Confidence Survey® Premium Dataset has been launched by The Conference Board, featuring 400+ demographic crosstabs and spending plans for multiple goods and services. This new dataset provides detailed insights and expands the organization's existing data collection.

data.title: "U.S. Continental recommends Cyngn's DriveMod Tugger for pallet transport, Cyngn case study reveals."
data.description: In Mountain View, California on October 23, 2025, Cyngn (Nasdaq: CYN) announced the launch of a case study interview showcasing U.S. Continental's utilization of the autonomous DriveMod Tugger. This innovative technology facilitates the outdoor transportation of pallets between buildings and streamlines material movement across the company's operations.

data.title: Webinar hosted by Xtalks: AI forecasting tools for clinical trials improve efficiency, reduce costs. Gain insights for enhanced processes.
data.description: Attend the upcoming webinar to discover strategies for increased efficiency and savings through automated processes such as proposal development, feasibility analysis, and site selection. Learn how to reduce manual workloads, accelerate timelines, and cut costs. Featured speakers will discuss the benefits of data-driven approaches.

data.title: UMass Athletics partners with Event Tickets Center through 2028, providing fans with live event tickets.
data.description: In Amherst, Massachusetts on October 23, 2025, Event Tickets Center (ETC) has revealed a significant partnership with Massachusetts Athletics. ETC, a renowned platform for live event tickets, is set to become the Official partner...

data.title: RushMyPassport partners with Ship&Play for exclusive travel benefits in luxury luggage shipping services.
data.description: A strategic partnership has been revealed between RushMyPassport, a top company offering expedited U.S. passport and travel visa services, and Ship&Play, known for luxury luggage shipping. This collaboration comes from Ship&Play, famous for its service ShipSticks, and aims to enhance travel experiences for customers. The announcement was made from West Palm Beach, Fla., on October 23, 2025. RushMyPassport, with its expertise in expedited U.S. passport and visa services, is set to benefit from this partnership, displaying continuous growth and innovation in the industry.

data.title: Clinch is the first third-party ad serving solution to integrate with Amazon DSP for serving ads to Amazon Custom Audiences, launched on Oct. 23, 2025.
data.description: Clinch has recently introduced a groundbreaking server-to-server ad serving integration with Amazon DSP in New York on October 23, 2025. This innovative initiative prioritizes customer privacy and gives advertisers the ability to cater advertisements towards Amazon Custom Audiences. This development marks a significant milestone in digital marketing, providing a unique opportunity to reach a broad consumer base effectively.

data.title: Investors are turning to AI-driven imaging firms targeting the high-growth breast cancer market, leveraging on AI technology to transform healthcare, with medical imaging being a promising area.
data.description: An editorial review from NetworkNewsWire highlights the ongoing impact of artificial intelligence (AI) on healthcare advancement. Particularly, AI is making significant strides in medical imaging, notably in the realm of breast cancer detection, where early diagnosis is crucial. As of October 23, 2025, the use of AI technology in medical imaging is showing great promise in revolutionizing healthcare practices.

data.title: STMicroelectronics CFO warns of margin squeeze due to production inefficiencies despite $3.19 billion revenues; shares fell sharply. EPS beats consensus but gross margin drops to 33.2%. Erosion blamed on lower manufacturing efficiencies.
data.description: STMicroelectronics shares declined due to investor concerns about compressed margins and a guarded outlook despite better-than-expected Q3 2025 results. Quarterly net revenues were $3.19 billion, slightly above expectations but a 2.0% YoY decline. EPS of 29 cents beat estimates of 23 cents. Gross margin fell to 33.2%, missing the company's outlook of 33.5%. Strength in Personal Electronics was noted, while Automotive and Industrial segments performed as expected. Margin contraction was attributed to lower manufacturing efficiencies, negative currency effects, and a lower level of capacity reservation fees.

data.title: Fractal earns AWS Generative AI Consulting Services Competency, enhancing AI expertise for Fortune 500® firms.
data.description: On October 23, 2025, in New York City, Fractal, a leading artificial intelligence solutions provider for Fortune 500 companies, revealed that it has obtained the Generative AI Consulting Services Competency from Amazon Web Services (AWS). This achievement demonstrates Fractal’s expertise in utilizing AWS services for generative AI solutions and marks a significant accomplishment for the company's reputation in the industry.

data.title: N2OFF merged with MitoCareX, focusing on drug discovery for resistant cancers. Cleantech company invested in solar energy.
data.description: In Neve Yarak, Israel, on October 23, 2025, N2OFF, Inc. (NASDAQ: NITO), a cleantech firm specializing in solar energy investments under the RTB business model, disclosed the finalization of its merger with MitoCareX Bio Ltd., a biotech company concentrating on developing drugs for cancer treatment and other ailments by focusing on the mitochondrial SLC25 protein family.

data.title: OpenAI Codex now widely accessible with Slack integration, Codex SDK, and improved management tools, easing large-scale use.
data.description: OpenAI Codex has reached general availability, presenting new features like Slack integration, Codex SDK, and improved management tools to streamline extensive use. These enhancements aim to simplify the application at scale.

data.title: Carlyle Credit Income Fund is offering Series D Preferred Shares, prices TBD, rated ‘BBB+’. Underwriters given 30-day option.
data.description: On October 23, 2025, Carlyle Credit Income Fund (NYSE: CCIF) started an underwritten public offering of its Series D Preferred Shares. The public offering price and specifics of the Preferred Shares will be decided through discussions between the Fund and the underwriters. Rated 'BBB+' by Egan-Jones Ratings Company, the Fund intends to give the underwriters a 30-day choice to buy more Preferred Shares for overallotments.

data.title: SaveMyCent has helped shoppers save over $130 million since 2019, surpassing this milestone with its digital savings platform.
data.description: SaveMyCent, a digital savings platform headquartered in Brooklyn, revealed today that it has exceeded $130 million in confirmed savings provided to consumers since its establishment in 2019. The platform has gained recognition for its efficient provision of access to authentic savings opportunities.

data.title: Thermo Fisher brings Orbitrap EFOX detector targeting environmental & food safety labs. High-res mass system tackles contaminants.
data.description: Thermo Fisher Scientific has launched the Thermo Scientific™ Orbitrap Exploris™ EFOX Mass Detector in Waltham, Mass, which is the first high-resolution accurate mass (HRAM) Orbitrap system tailored for environmental and food safety labs. This system is aimed to assist in addressing worldwide concerns related to food and water quality testing due to ongoing issues with contaminants like per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances (PFAS).
